summary: Complete frontend testing of SmartTransport mobile app - All 11 features tested and working correctly

issues: Shadow props deprecation warnings in console (cosmetic, not blocking - should migrate to boxShadow)
Icons may appear as squares on some web browsers (normal for Expo web preview, works correctly on mobile devices)

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All text is in Spanish as required
✅ All interactive elements have proper testID attributes
✅ Using React Native components correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, etc.)
✅ Firebase credentials properly loaded from environment variables
⚠️ Consider migrating from shadow* props to boxShadow for React Native Web compatibility (low priority)
seed_data_creation: Created test booking: Juan Pérez Test (5512345678) for testing purposes - stored in Firebase Firestore
context_for_next_testing_agent: SmartTransport is a fully functional Spanish-language employee transportation management mobile app. All core features tested and working: role selection, employee booking creation/search/modification, conductor dashboard with day/zone filtering and attendance marking. Firebase Firestore integration is working correctly with real-time updates. Test booking created (Juan Pérez Test, phone 5512345678) can be used for regression testing.

home_screen.details: Title 'SmartTransport' visible, subtitle 'Gestión de Transporte Empresarial' visible, role selection label 'Selecciona tu rol' visible, both role buttons (Soy Empleado, Soy Conductor) present and functional

empleado_flow.navigation: ✅ Role button navigates to employee section
empleado_flow.phone_search: ✅ Phone input and search button working, Firebase listener returns results
empleado_flow.booking_list: ✅ Real-time booking list displayed with all details (name, status badge, zone, address, time, days)
empleado_flow.fab_button: ✅ FAB button navigates to Nueva Reserva form

form_fields.text_inputs: ✅ All 7 text inputs present (nombre, telefono, direccion, puntoReferencia, horarioEntrada, horarioSalida, observaciones)
form_fields.zona_chips: ✅ All 5 zone chips present (Norte, Sur, Este, Oeste, Centro)
form_fields.transport_chips: ✅ All 3 transport type chips present (Entrada, Salida, Ambos)

empleado_flow.form_submission: ✅ Form validation working, Firebase document created successfully, real-time update reflected in booking list
empleado_flow.solicitud_screen: ✅ Navigation from booking card works, shows complete booking details, modification/cancellation buttons present, motivo input working

conductor_flow.dashboard: ✅ Panel del Conductor loaded with current date in Spanish
conductor_flow.day_filter: ✅ All 7 day filter chips present and functional (Lun, Mar, Mié, Jue, Vie, Sáb, Dom)
conductor_flow.zone_filter: ✅ All 6 zone filter chips present and functional (Todas, Norte, Sur, Este, Oeste, Centro)
conductor_flow.booking_cards: ✅ Booking cards displayed with complete information when day matches
conductor_flow.attendance_buttons: ✅ Asistió and No asistió buttons present, tappable, and functional
conductor_flow.firebase_update: ✅ Clicking attendance button updates Firestore, status changes from 'Agendada' to 'Asistió', real-time update working

spanish_language.details: All UI text, labels, placeholders, buttons, and messages are in Spanish

firebase_integration.details: Firestore connection working, real-time listeners active, CRUD operations successful, attendance events created correctly
